security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: LaTeX-powered thesis editor — no LaTeX required
bundle.longDescription: TeXisStudio helps undergraduate, master's, doctoral, and postdoctoral students produce high-quality academic documents using LaTeX as the engine, without needing to learn LaTeX. You edit a structured model; the app generates clean LaTeX; the resulting PDF is portable and compilable independently.
